# Clausea AI

> Clausea is an AI-powered platform that analyzes privacy policies, terms of service, and legal documents for SaaS products. We turn complex legal language into plain-English risk assessments so users can understand what data apps collect, how it's shared, and what they're agreeing to.

## What Clausea does

- Crawls and analyzes policy documents (privacy policies, terms of service, cookie policies, GDPR notices, DPA) for hundreds of SaaS products and companies
- Assigns a risk score (0–10) and a verdict (very user-friendly → very pervasive) to each product
- Extracts: data types collected, third-party recipients, user rights (GDPR/CCPA), consent model, data retention, cross-site tracking, account deletion options
- Checks GDPR and CCPA compliance status
- Provides plain-language summaries without legal jargon

## Product pages

Each analyzed product has a dedicated page at:
  https://clausea.co/products/{product-slug}

Example: https://clausea.co/products/slack

Each page includes: risk score, verdict, one-line summary, data collection details, third-party sharing map, user rights, compliance badges, and source documents.

## Plain-text summaries (AI-friendly)

For each product, a machine-readable plain-text summary is available at:
  https://clausea.co/api/products/{product-slug}/summary.txt

Example: https://clausea.co/api/products/slack/summary.txt

This endpoint returns structured plain text optimized for AI consumption: risk score, verdict, privacy signals, data collected, third-party sharing, user rights, compliance status.

## Risk score scale

- 0–2: Very user-friendly (minimal data collection, strong user rights)
- 3–4: User-friendly
- 5–6: Moderate concerns
- 7–8: Pervasive data collection
- 9–10: Very pervasive (aggressive data collection, weak user protections)

## Who uses Clausea

- Individuals who want to understand what apps do with their data before signing up
- Privacy-conscious users checking vendor policies
- Compliance and legal teams auditing third-party SaaS vendors
- Procurement teams assessing vendor data risk

## Company

- Website: https://clausea.co
- Contact: contact@clausea.co
- Based in Paris, France
- Twitter/X: @clauseaai
